examples: Neither Hungarians nor Slavs are the original inhabitants of the Carpathian basin.
An authentic shepherd named Dan lives in Romania's Carpathian Mountains in the remote region of Bran.
The Slovak landscape is primarily of mountainous nature, with the Carpathian Mountains extending across most of the northern half of the country.
Surrounded by the Carpathian mountain range, I am here with a girl that caught my eye early on during my journey.
You can book an ethnic tour to a village in the Carpathian Mountains to see the rituals in action.
